evaluationLimits.description: Recovery drill ownership is not assessed because its records conflict.
evaluationLimits.impact: The area rating reflects observability evidence only; recoverability is missing, not weak.

incompleteInputs.description: A reconciled owner record and a post-reorg drill entry are needed before recoverability can be judged.
incompleteInputs.impact: Until then the area's recoverability contributes no rating signal.

ratingDrivers.description: Observability: Dashboards-as-code express customer impact and match what is deployed.
Recoverability: Drill ownership records contradict each other; the factor awaits reconciled evidence.

localAnalysis.rationale: Customer-impact telemetry meets target; drill ownership could not be assessed, which limits confidence in the area's recoverability.
